calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Connie Y. Chan, Esq. appeared with petitioner Andy Yin Tam, who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Andrew Tan.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Reset To May-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Connie Y. Chan, Esq. appeared with petitioner Andy Yin Tam, who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court is unable to proceed with today's hearing as the petition for change of name is incomplete.

Good cause appearing, the Order to Show Cause for Change of Name is continued to May 26, 2009 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.

Reissued Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
